scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/schema && npm run prisma:generate && npm run build -w packages/templates && npm run build -w apps/api && npm run build -w apps/web
scripts.build:api: npm run build -w packages/schema && npm run prisma:generate && npm run build -w packages/templates && npm run build -w apps/api
scripts.build:web: npm run build -w packages/schema && npm run build -w packages/templates && npm run build -w apps/web
